title: Deconstruct ESM vs. CJS Interoperability
description: Deconstruct the fundamental differences and interoperability challenges between ESM and CJS. Master the asynchronous module loader and the use of top-level await in ESM. Analyze the architectural implications of static versus dynamic imports on application structure and performance.
objectives: Deconstruct the fundamental differences and interoperability challenges between ESM and CJS.
Master the asynchronous module loader and the use of top-level await in ESM.
Analyze the architectural implications of static versus dynamic imports on application structure and performance.
